title: Wardrobe Swapd’
description: My take on Portable Wardrobe ‘s textures. Retextures all items and improves GUI..
body:
# Wardrobe-Swap'd
v1.0
My take on [Glubaz's Portable Wardrobes (Easy Armor Swap)'s](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/portable-wardrobes-easy-armor-swap) textures.

- Changes Item/GUI textures.
- Fixes English .lang files and adds Spanish Translations (MX).

If anyone wants to comment/make suggestions/corrections/contribute with translations be sure to let me know, [here.](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/wardrobe-swapd/) (Modrinth doesn't support comments) and I'll be sure to check them out.

**Check the gallery for images**
